summary: Gives WA Police temporary special powers around the Land Forces defence exposition in Perth in October 2026. Inside a defined security zone, officers can set up checkpoints, search people and vehicles, seize listed items, close roads, and order people to move on, with most of the powers expiring on 11 October once the event is over.
